title: Where Do Models Find Happiness? Emotion Vectors in Open-Source LLMs
abstract: arXiv:2606.26987v1 Announce Type: cross  Abstract: Recent work identified emotion vectors in Claude Sonnet 4.5, which are internal representations that encode emotion concepts, causally influence behavior, and exhibit geometry mirroring human psychological structure. We test the generality of these findings in two open-weight models, Apertus-8B-Instruct-2509 and Gemma-4-E4B-it, extracting emotion contrast vectors across all layers, using two model-generated corpora. We recover valence geometry for both models, with peak PC1--valence correlations of $r = 0.76$ and $r = 0.83$, approaching the $r = 0.81$ reported for Claude.Beyond replication, we observe notable differences in how valence representations emerge across model depth. In Gemma-4-E4B-it, valence is strongly encoded in early layers but collapses towards later layers, whereas Apertus-8B-Instruct-2509 exhibits the opposite pattern, with valence representations absent in early layers, but emerging at mid depths. Arousal encoding,

translated_title: 模型何处觅幸福？开源大语言模型中的情绪向量
translated_abstract: arXiv:2606.26987v1 公告类型：交叉 摘要：近期研究在Claude Sonnet 4.5中识别出情绪向量，这些内部表征编码了情绪概念，对行为具有因果影响，并展现出与人类心理结构相镜像的几何特性。我们在两个开放权重模型（Apertus-8B-Instruct-2509和Gemma-4-E4B-it）中检验了这些发现的普适性，通过使用两个模型生成的语料库，提取了所有层中的情绪对比向量。我们恢复了两个模型的效价几何结构，其主成分1与效价之间的峰值相关系数分别为r = 0.76和r = 0.83，接近Claude报告的r = 0.81。除了重复验证外，我们还观察到效价表征在模型深度上出现方式的显著差异。在Gemma-4-E4B-it中，效价在早期层中强烈编码，但在后期层中衰减，而Apertus-8B-Instruct-2509则呈现相反模式，效价表征在早期层缺失，而在中层出现。唤醒度编码，
tldr: 本研究验证了开源大语言模型中也存在类似Claude的情绪向量，并发现不同模型在效价表征的层间分布上存在显著差异（早期vs中层出现）。
en_tdlr: This study validates the existence of emotion vectors in open-source LLMs similar to those in Claude, and reveals notable differences in the layer-wise distribution of valence representations (early vs. mid-layer emergence) across models.
